narrative.text: Chloe Middlebrooks struck out looking (1-2 BSFFFFFK).
Kiki Edwards walked (3-0 BBBB).
Dylan Carlson hit by pitch (3-0 BBBH); Kiki Edwards advanced to second.
Maia Mumpfield singled to center field (1-1 BF); Dylan Carlson out at second cf to 2b; Kiki Edwards advanced to third.
s g struck out swinging (0-2 SSS).
Will Castro walked (3-0 BBBB).
Nico Hoerner doubled to center field (1-2 BFFF); Will Castro advanced to third.
Steve Bartman homered to left center, 3 RBI (1-0 B); Nico Hoerner scored; Will Castro scored.
Pete Crow-Armstrong out at first cf to 2b (0-0).
Julian Merryweather pinch hit for Jon Berti.
Julian Merryweather grounded out to 1b unassisted (0-0).
Matt Shaw reached first on a throwing error by 3b (1-2 BFF).
Dansby Swanson reached first on a fielding error by 3b (0-0); Matt Shaw advanced to second.
Jacob Vanek pinch ran for Dansby Swanson.
Ian Happ flied out to rf (0-0).
Michael Soroka to 3b for Julian Merryweather.
Jacob Vanek to lf.
Payton Oconnor popped up to 2b (1-0 B).
Chloe Middlebrooks to rf.
Kiki Edwards to cf.
Dylan Carlson to lf.
Maia Mumpfield to ss.
Payton Oconnor to 2b.
Bella Morton to c.
Judd Wascom to p.
Nolan Gorman to dh.
Ashton Schroyer to 1b.
Ashton Schroyer fouled out to rf (0-2 FF).
Bella Morton popped out to 1b (1-0 B).
Miguel Amaya struck out, reached first on a wild pitch (1-1 BF).
Will Castro struck out, reached first on a passed ball (0-0); Miguel Amaya advanced to second.
Nico Hoerner struck out, reached first on an error by c (0-0); Will Castro advanced to second; Miguel Amaya advanced to third.
Steve Bartman tripled down the rf line, 3 RBI (0-0); Nico Hoerner scored, unearned; Will Castro scored; Miguel Amaya scored.
Pete Crow-Armstrong was intentionally walked (3-0 BBBB).
Michael Soroka reached on a fielder's choice (0-0); Pete Crow-Armstrong out at second 2b to ss.
Matt Shaw out at first p to 2b, SAC (0-0); Michael Soroka advanced to second.
Jacob Vanek flied out to rf, sacrifice fly (0-0); Steve Bartman scored.
Judd Wascom singled (0-0).
Chloe Middlebrooks grounded into double play ss to 2b to 1b (0-0); Judd Wascom out on the play.
Kiki Edwards singled (0-0).
Kiki Edwards stole second.
Kiki Edwards out at third c to 2b, caught stealing.
Ian Happ Dropped foul ball, E9 (0-0).
Ian Happ singled (0-0).
Miguel Amaya singled, advanced to second on the throw (0-0); Ian Happ advanced to second, out at third lf to c.
Will Castro singled (0-0).
Nico Hoerner grounded into double play 3b to 2b to 1b (0-0); Will Castro out on the play.
Dylan Carlson singled (0-0).
Maia Mumpfield singled (0-0); Dylan Carlson advanced to second.
s g hit into triple play 3b to 2b to 1b (0-0); Maia Mumpfield out on the play; Dylan Carlson out on the play.
Steve Bartman Dropped foul ball, E9 (0-0).
Steve Bartman singled (0-0).
Steve Bartman advanced to second on an error by 2b, assist by p, did not advance.
Pete Crow-Armstrong flied out to rf, sacrifice fly (2-2 BBKK); Steve Bartman advanced to third.
Michael Soroka reached first on a fielding error by 3b, advanced to second (0-2 FFF); Steve Bartman scored on an error by 3b, unearned.
Matt Shaw lined out to ss (0-0).
Jacob Vanek reached on catcher's interference (0-0).
Ian Happ out on batter's interference (0-0).
Payton Oconnor reached first on an error by 1b, assist by ss (0-0).
Payton Oconnor stole second, advanced to third on an error by c.
Ashton Schroyer struck out; Payton Oconnor caught stealing c to 2b, double play.
Bella Morton Ashton Schroyer placed on second (0-0).
Bella Morton Batter set to Dylan Carlson (0-0).
